short_blurb: Full-service roofing in West Covina — repairs, tile, shingle, flat, and more.
local_note: West Covina's South Hills neighborhood and hillside properties require experience with steep pitches and concrete tile. The flatter neighborhoods to the north have large-format homes with shingle roofs in the 15–25 year age range. We're active throughout West Covina and can typically get a free inspection scheduled within a day or two of your call.

faqs.q: How quickly can you get out to inspect my West Covina roof?
faqs.a: We typically schedule free inspections within 1–3 business days. If you have an active leak, we prioritize emergency calls and can usually get out same day or next day.
